use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated text reveal and decorative underline effect
Marketing site header featuring black-and-white styled CTA buttons with bounce feedback
Product or portfolio showcase hero with fade-in-up content animations
SaaS landing page introduction section with keyboard-accessible button interactions
ai_summary: A minimalist hero section component featuring an animated decorative underline effect on the main heading, fade-in-up animations for staggered content reveal, and pure black-and-white styled CTA buttons with a subtle bounce interaction on click. Uses CSS keyframe animations and CVA for button variant styling, prioritizing accessibility with focus-visible outlines.
